titleStmt.title: SII 15.217: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 217. (B.K. No. 191 of 1928-29.) AṆṆIGĒRI, NAVALGUND TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar in the maṇḍapa of the Amṛitēśvara temple.

This is dated the 15th regnal year of the king, Krōdhana, Āshāḍha śu. 13, Monday, Saṅkramaṇa-pradōsha. The said tithi corresponds to 1205 A.D., June 30, which was Thursday. The Saṅkramaṇa, i.e. Dakshiṇāyana-saṅkramaṇa occurred on June 27, Monday.

It records a gift of money for offerings at the time of pradōsha on the fourth, seventh and thirteenth tithis to the god Svayambhu-Amṛitēśvara of the rājadhāṉipaṭṭaṇa Aṇṇigeṟe, by Hākiseṭṭiya-Dēvayya. The money was deposited with the One Thousand Mahājanas of the place, who were to utilise its interest only for the said purpose. It contains praise of the donor and his daughter. The record is damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
nama dracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkya
ya śaṁbha sakaḷama
ḍā pādapīṭhaṁ bhavāni
damaged
. tatpādapadmōpajīvi
kāvamukhaṁ rāṇakkaṟivaṁsenu
nuṁ tanagopputippu mādēviya peṁpuvetta kuvaraṁ kalipaṁḍita
Anēka yyadaṇnāyakaru beḷvoladēśamaṁ duṣṭanigrahasiṣṭapratipāḷanaṁ geyyu
ttamippaṁdu śrī vijayakīrttikāṁtaṁgīvaradēvaṁge satyavākyaṁgakhiḷōrbbī vinutaṁ puṭṭi
dinakkelōkadāyuṁ śrīyuṁ . bahuḷapuṁṇyaśaktibaḷagoṁḍudumanneṁ
mūrttigoṁḍudu siriṟoppugoṁḍudu nayaṁ nelegoṁḍu nanni nāṁṭu goṁḍudu jasaṁ ni
kaṇigoṁḍudu rūḍhi gāḍigoṁḍudu hākiseṭṭiyara dēvanoḷī śvara bhaktanā
varapadumaprabhavāṁgadoḷu prathitapātāḷaṁgaḷoḷu pārvvatīśvaranu
nuddharabaṁdhaṁgaḷoḷu surarājapramadēbhamastakadoḷāśādaṁti daṁta
kiseṭṭiyara dēvaṁ dāniyeṁbaṁkavanu . baḍavarbbālakaraṁdha vriddha
kuḷarāturabyasanigaḷu hridrōgigaḷu yōgigaḷu naḍa
yeṁdaḍavatyūrjjita hākiseṭṭiyara dēvaṁganyarēṁpāṭiya . tama
janaṁ taledūge bāppu bāppana kuḍalāṟadippatikaniṣṭa
jananuta hākiseṭṭiyara dēvayanāyakanudughakīrttikā
ra mūgina mēle pātramanu . Antu samastaguṇasaṁpannanappa hākiseṭṭi
nāyakana tanūjāteya guṇōnnatikeyeṁteṁdaḍe . kāmana ratigeṇeyeni paḷu sō
ṇige pāṭiyenipaḷu śivanā prēmada girijeyoḷeṇeyene dēmalanāriya kumāri pā
trada . svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇaṁ bhujabhaḷapratāpa hoyisaḷa cakravartti
vīraballāḷadēvavarṣada 15 neya krōdhana saṁvatsarada Āśāḍa suddha 13 yōdasi sōma vāra
byatīpāta saṁkramaṇa pradōśada puṇyatithiyaṁdu . śrīmadrājadhānipaṭṭaṇavaṇnige
ṟeyalli sakaḷakaḷāsāṁnidhya dakṣiṇavāraṇāśi śrī svayaṁbhuvamṛtēśvaradēvargge hāki
seṭṭiya dēvayaṁnu cavuti saputami trayōdaśiya pradōśadoḷiṁtī mūṟuṁ tithiya pāya
sada nivēdyakkaṁ dēvarige nālukaḍake yeṁṭeleya vīḷayamuṁ brāhmaṇarige nālukaḍake yeṁ
ṭeleya vīḷayaviṁtinituṁ naḍevantāgi dēvaputraka sāsirvvara kayyalu hoṁge hāga vri
ddhiyalu koṭṭa gadyāṇavāṟu yī honna baḍḍiyalācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ naḍesuvaru
Digital edition of SII 15.217 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
